title: dryopteris adscendens
intro: Dryopteris adscendens, also known as the intermediate wood fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the Dryopteris genus. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can help to reduce swelling and prevent infection. The health benefits of Dryopteris adscendens include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
